feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to add purchase group in J1IGSUBREP Report
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

How can I add additional fields (e.g., EKGRP) in the J1IGSUBREP report? Kindly refer me to any BAdI or user exit available for this requirement.

Advance thanks.

entry.title: IDE in VSCODE
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Would like to know the current status/update regarding SAP IDE support in VS Code.

Last year SAP shared updates about bringing ABAP Development Tools / IDE capabilities into VS Code. Could you please share:

Current availability status
Planned roadmap / GA timeline

entry.title: USER EXIT OR BADI FOR AUTOMATIC SERIAL NUMBER CREATION IN CO01
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a requirement to create serial numbers automatically during Production Order creation in SAP CO01. Kindly suggest any suitable BAdI or user exit to achieve this requirement.

Advance Thanks

entry.title: Hi team, I want transfer the Additional fields from the Product master from S4 HANA to GTS.
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

In the standard SAP GTS build, S/4 materials are replicated in the SAP GTS system via RFC and information from the basic data view is migrated automatically in the system. For material level attributes not transferred natively, a GTS Badi is available in the S/4 GTS Plug-In.  Combined with SAP GTS IMG configuration the system can store these additional values in predefined table fields specified in configuration. Additional fields, in the material master, need to be passed to GTS, from S/4 System

  • Customs description (Sales text)
  • Material Type
  • Material Group
  • Division
  • Country of Origin

Can someone please tell me How I can proceed with the Development ?
very High in complexity. kindly please response as soon as possible. 7499552629.

entry.title: Date format is not correct when we download the document from SAP.
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We need your help on below issue  
We have created a Batch job to Download the SAP report automatically into user system every day. The batch job is working fine and it is downloading the report in the EXCEL format. But when the user opening the automatic downloaded excel document, the date format got disturbed.

It is not coming in a date format, it is appearing as just number.

So, we need your help to resolve this issue.

User is facing this issue only when the report downloaded automatically through batch job.

If the user manually downloads the document, it is working fine without any issue.

Kindly check the attachment related to issue user facing.

Thanks & Regards,
Gagana N

entry.title: WebGUI Short Dump GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED in CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue with SAP WebGUI.

When trying to log in to WebGUI, the browser shows HTTP 404 error and in ST22 I found the following dump:

Category: ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
ABAP Program: CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Application Component: BC-FES-ITS

Short Text:
Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

Error Analysis:
An attempt was made to access a field symbol that has not been assigned yet (data segment number "-1").
Interesting behavior:

  • Yesterday my account could access WebGUI normally without any issue.
  • Starting today, my account can no longer log in to WebGUI and triggers the dump above.
  • My friend can still log in to WebGUI normally using his own account on his laptop.
  • However, when I tried logging in using my account on my friend's laptop, the same dump/error occurred.
  • After my account triggered the error on his laptop, even my friend’s own account could no longer access WebGUI on that same laptop/browser session.
  • I also still cannot access WebGUI from my own laptop.
  • SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.
  • Clearing cache/cookies and using incognito mode does not solve the issue.

    Additional information:
    • My account is a super user with roles SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW.
    • The issue does not seem related to authorization because SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

Has anyone experienced something similar with BC-FES-ITS or CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2 dumps?

Could this be related to:

  • ITS session corruption

  • WebGUI personalization

  • role/menu rendering

  • kernel or SAP Note issue?

Any suggestions on what to check next would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: WebGUI Short Dump GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED in CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue with SAP WebGUI.

When trying to log in to WebGUI, the browser shows HTTP 404 error and in ST22 I found the following dump:

Category: ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
ABAP Program: CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Application Component: BC-FES-ITS

Short Text:
Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

Error Analysis:
An attempt was made to access a field symbol that has not been assigned yet (data segment number "-1").

Interesting behavior:

  • Yesterday my account could access WebGUI normally without any issue.

  • Starting today, my account can no longer log in to WebGUI and triggers the dump above.

  • My friend can still log in to WebGUI normally using his own account on his laptop.

  • However, when I tried logging in using my account on my friend's laptop, the same dump/error occurred.

  • After my account triggered the error on his laptop, even my friend’s own account could no longer access WebGUI on that same laptop/browser session.

  • I also still cannot access WebGUI from my own laptop.

  • SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

  • Clearing cache/cookies and using incognito mode does not solve the issue.

    Additional information:

    • My account is a super user with roles SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW.

    • The issue does not seem related to authorization because SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

It seems related specifically to WebGUI / ITS runtime because the dump occurs in:

CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Component: BC-FES-ITS

Has anyone experienced something similar before?

Could this be related to:

  • ITS session corruption

  • WebGUI personalization

  • role/menu rendering

  • kernel or SAP Note issue?

Any suggestions on what to check next would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Submit and return silent skip in process inbound api
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have an issue sometimes data from the inbound REST API silently skips the process. When this happens, no data is processed, and absolutely no log is written into our custom logging table. Since this issue only happens occasionally in Production (and works fine in Development/Quality environments), I suspect it might be related to system load or session limitations. The submit program originally waiting time with default 12 second the code look like this.

  SUBMIT zxxx WITH v_wait = 12
              AND RETURN.

Any insights, experiences, or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: LT10 single transfer order for multiple handling units in fiori app
entry.content:
My goal is to replicate the LT10 behavior by creating a custom Fiori application where a user can select multiple Handling Units from a list and trigger the creation of a single Transfer Order (TO) containing multiple items (one per HU), instead of multiple single-item TOs.

I started investigating RAP and creating custom CDS Views. Anyways I'm a begginer in SAP so my knowledge is insufficient.
My question is : is it even possible ?

if yes, how ?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: How we can pass parameters from UI5 application to HTML for gui app in fiori lauchpad?
entry.content:
Here is my custom application where sales order is generated with billing document number and parcel number. Those Billing document and parcel number i have to display in HTML for GUI app (Receipt Voucher) custom ABAP report in Fiori Launchpad. 

  Above billing document number and parcel number i have to pass to HTML for GUI app (Receipt Voucher)

Here is the js function i have written 

onReceiptBoucher: function() {
var sBillingDoc = 78454656565;
var sParcelNo = 5454626526;
 
if (!sBillingDoc || !sParcelNo) {
sap.m.MessageBox.error("Please generate billing document first.");
return;
}
 
var xmservice = sap.ushell && sap.ushell.Container &&
sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
 
if (xmservice) {
var hash = xmservice.hrefForExternal({
target: {
semanticObject: "ZRV",
action: "display"
},
// Parameters perfectly match your configuration mapping
params: {
"BillingDoc": [String(sBillingDoc)],
"ParcelNum": [String(sParcelNo)],
"DYNP_OKCODE": ["=ONLI"] // Bypasses selection screen by clicking Execute
}
});
 
var url = window.location.href.split('#')[0] + hash;
sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(url, true);
} else {
sap.m.MessageToast.show("Fiori Launchpad services are unavailable.");
}
}

entry.title: Recommended way to retrieve an OTR long text by alias in ABAP?
entry.content:
Hi,
with transactions SOTR_EDIT and SE63 it is possible to provide texts and translations. These texts can be loaded in ABAP code using function modules. When creating a new entry in SOTR_EDIT you have to choose between short and long text. When retrieving the texts in ABAP everything is working fine with short texts - but not with long texts.
 
Function module SOTR_GET_TEXT_KEY can only retrieve short texts.
 
Function module SOTR_STRING_READ_TEXT_WITH_KEY could read long text, but you have to provide the concept id.
The function module SOTR_GET_KEY_FOR_ALIAS can retrieve concept ids for short text, but not for long text.
 
Method CL_WD_UTILITIES=>GET_OTR_TEXT_BY_ALIAS works for both short and long texts. But the description of the method contains a warning ("DO NOT USE").
 
So I'm stuck here and I'd  like to know what is the recommended way to retrieve an OTR long text for an alias in ABAP? Which methods or function modules do you use?
 
Kind regards
Guido

entry.title: Unable to read repository during installation of ABAP Development (Eclipse)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While installing ABAP Development Test cockpit getting unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest (Eclipse)

entry.title: issue while updating pricing conditions for NBIC Purchase Orders using API_PURCHASEORDER_2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue while updating pricing conditions for NBIC Purchase Orders using API_PURCHASEORDER_2 in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Scenario:

* PO Type: NBIC
* API: API_PURCHASEORDER_2
* Entity: PurOrderItemPricingElement
* Condition Type: PMP0

I am able to successfully PATCH the pricing condition using Postman and receive HTTP 200 OK response, but the value is not actually updated in the database. After re-reading the pricing element, the old value is restored automatically.

PATCH URL:

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurOrderItemPricingElement(
PurchaseOrder='4500000450',
PurchaseOrderItem='00010',
PricingDocument='1000000667',
PricingDocumentItem='000010',
PricingProcedureStep='060',
PricingProcedureCounter='001'
)

Payload:

{
"ConditionRateAmount": 159.000000000,
"ConditionCurrency": "AED",
"ConditionIsManuallyChanged": true
}

Response:

* HTTP 200 OK
* No API error

However, after GET:

* ConditionRateAmount still shows old value
* Pricing seems to be redetermined automatically

Observed fields from GET response:

{
"ConditionControl": "C",
"ConditionOrigin": "C",
"ConditionIsDeletable": false,
"ConditionType": "PMP0"
}

Additional findings:

1. POST on PurOrderItemPricingElement is not supported
Error:
"Creating operations are disabled for entity"

2. PATCH on PurchaseOrderItem with NetPriceAmount also returns:
"Operation is not enabled"

3. Same API update works correctly for NB Purchase Orders, but not for NBIC.

My questions:

1. Is pricing condition update intentionally restricted for NBIC Purchase Orders in Public Cloud?
2. Are PMP0/intercompany conditions protected from API persistence?
3. Is there any supported approach to update pricing for NBIC POs through API?
4. Should pricing only be updated indirectly through condition records/info records?

Any guidance or SAP documentation reference would be appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: ABAP Trial: OData V4 service binding shows Published but runtime says service group not published
entry.content:
I am experiencing the same issue today in SAP BTP ABAP Trial, system TRL, client 100, while working through SAP Learning “Basic ABAP Programming”.
I also commented on a similar existing thread, but I am opening a separate question because I have a reproducible case with a working old binding and a failing newly created binding on the same RAP BO.
An existing OData V4 UI service binding still works: ZUI_98FLIGHT_O4
To isolate the issue, I created a new OData V4 UI service binding on the same working RAP BO / service definition: ZUI_96FLIGHT_O4
ADT shows: Local Service Endpoint: Published
The generated inbound service also exists: ZUI_96FLIGHT_O4_0001_G4BA
However, the Test fails with:
"Service group 'ZUI_96FLIGHT_O4' not published"
The ADT Feed Reader / Gateway Error Log shows:
  • Package: /IWFND/V4_COS_PUBLISHING
  • Application Component: BC-ESI-ESF-GW
  • Request Kind: Server OData V4
  • Service Name: ZUI_96FLIGHT_O4
  • Service Version: 0001
  • Group ID: ZUI_96FLIGHT_O4
Request URI: /sap/opu/odata4/sap/zui_96flight_o4/srvd/sap/zui_96flight_o4/0001/$metadata?sap-documentation=all
Exception: /IWBEP/CX_V4_ACCESS_CHECK
  • Text: Service group 'ZUI_96FLIGHT_O4' not published
  • HTTP_STATUS_CODE: 404
  • Raise Location: /IWFND/CL_V4_PUBLISHING_DBA
The source extract shows that the runtime checks /IWFND/C_V4_MSGR:
SELECT SINGLE group_id FROM /iwfnd/c_v4_msgr
      INTO lv_group_id
      WHERE group_id = iv_group_id.
 
This check fails although ADT shows the service binding as Published.
Conclusion:
It looks like the ADT publish action updates the service binding object, but the OData V4 runtime publication entry is not created in /IWFND/C_V4_MSGR.
Old service bindings continue to work, but newly created service bindings do not.
Has anyone found a workaround for the ABAP Trial system?
One additional detail: a few days ago I ran “Check for Updates” in Eclipse and updated my ADT/Eclipse installation. I am not sure whether this is related, but the issue started after that timeframe.

entry.title: How to add attachment to the send request in PPF?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on a requirement.

When a PPF action (External Comm) is executed and sends an email out, we can attach any files to this email and it works without any problem. But attachments are not visible in the below grid.

My question is that; how can we add attachments to the Send Request during the PPF execution. So that, attachments will be visible in the ATTACHMENTS Grid?

Tip: COMPLETE_SEND method is only for recipient adding purpose as far as i understand.

Regards

entry.title: generate a Z-Transaction for End-Users, using se16h
entry.content: Can we generate a Z-Transaction for End-Users, using se16h , joining two table ACDOCA and CATSDB

entry.title: gCTS: parallel development on the same server
entry.content:
I am currently using SAP S/4HANA with gCTS on a single DEV server, and I am trying to understand whether parallel development on the same object is possible when using different Git branches.

My scenario is the following:

  • Two developers are working in the same DEV system.

  • Each developer is using a different Git branch in gCTS.

  • Both developers need to modify the same ABAP object (for example, the same class, program, or CDS view) for different features.

Since gCTS is Git-based and supports branching, I expected that each developer could work independently in their own branch without locking the object for the other developer. However, in practice, the SAP object locking/edit mechanism still seems to prevent parallel editing on the same system.

So my question is:

Is true parallel development of the same object possible with gCTS when both developers are working in the same SAP DEV server but on different Git branches?

Or does gCTS branching only work properly for parallel development if each branch is connected to a separate development system/environment?

If anyone has experience with this scenario or knows the recommended approach for enabling parallel development of the same object with gCTS, I would really appreciate the clarification.

entry.title: Force document-wide re-pricing on sales order total parent quantity with respect to a threshold valu
entry.content:
Hello experts,

is there a way to force document-wide re-pricing programmatically when the total order quantity (parent items, not children) changes with respect to a threshold value? I want to do this during order creation or modification (VA01, VA02 or called indirectly via BAPIs).

I tried numerous userexits in MV45AFZZ and MV45AFZB but I was not able to cover cases when, say, a new line item is entered. Re-pricing is invoked only for this line item.

System is SAP_ABAP 75I (S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023).

Regards,

Konstantinos

entry.title: Materials are getting skipped during MRP live(MD01N) run
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a custom table in which all the active materials are stored for MRP live planning. e.g. table contains 10K article(one plant).

We are calling MD01N(via background job) in the packet size of 1000 materials so MD01N job will be called 10 times.  We made the job call sequential so one by one job will be executed. 

Every time we see, despite all the jobs are successfully finished, some materials are getting skipped. The count of skipped materials varies but average 1000 materials are skipped.

Then we have to manually run the MD01N with the skipped articles and let's say 200 are processed. then again run with remaining 800 material then some more are processed and so on.

Any one encountered this issue ? Any suggestions where we can why materials are getting skipped?

Regards,

Jitendra

entry.title: BADI or User Exit for Routing
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Our requirement is to restrict the deletion of operations/activities in transaction code CA02.
Currently, users are able to delete routing operations through CA02. We want to control or prevent operation deletion.
Kindly suggest if there is any suitable BAdI or user exit available to achieve this requirement.

Advance Thanks.
